ops.text: CLEAN-SLATE DECISION (2026-07-16, user-directed): the eval-v3 prereg/accrual apparatus is scrapped — no addendum counter, no preregistered 2026-07-24 freeze, no accrual targets. Rationale: the capture/quarantine fix arc (de3f9bd…c95c9ebf) made empty-context rows structurally impossible at source, and the user directed a first-principles restart: wipe ~/.cc-steer/eval/ wholesale, refreeze from the clean dataset's test split under the EmptyEvalContext guard, and replace preregistration with a simple refresh rule (refreezes are deliberate, versioned, guarded, journaled via `cc-steer freeze-eval`). The S-c routing / power questions this prereg served are re-grounded on the clean frame via the C3 judged-gate work (helpful-coverage + golden packet) in the approved adoption plan (plans/lets-see-what-we-synchronous-cookie.md). Task c2349fe cancelled accordingly.
